name: Spirit Bulb (Greater)
description:
Activate 2 (concentrate, manipulate)

This magical bulb is harvested from an ancient grove rich in primal plant magic. When you activate the bulb, you either eat it to have it cast a 6th-rank spell affecting you, or plant it in the ground next to you to have it cast a 6th-rank spell. If you choose the summoning option, the plant or fungus appears where you planted the bulb, and you can Sustain the activation to keep control of the creature.
